## Purpose

This directory contains templates for future project discussions.

## Responsibilities

- Keep open-ended discussion separate from accepted specifications.
- Encourage evidence-driven project conversations.
- Support future governance workflows.

## Future Contents

- Design discussion templates.
- Standards discussion templates.
- Roadmap discussion templates.

## Relationship to Other Directories

Discussions may eventually lead to proposals, standards, or documentation updates.
